description:
Send a secure intra-office message in NOSH ChartingSystem regarding a critical lab value.

Login Credentials:
- Username: admin
- Password: Admin1234!

Compose and send a message to Dr. James Carter (username: demo_provider) linked to patient Maria Rodriguez (DOB: 1978-06-14) with the subject 'URGENT: Critical Lab Value' and the body 'Lab called. Potassium 6.2. Please advise.'
